title: Mortar Pestle Set, Natural Granite Mortar and Pestle Grinder. Guacamole Bowl, Molcajete for Avocado, Salsa, Tacos. Spice Grinder, Heavy Stone Mortar. Great Gift Idea. Black Polished 1.5 Cups
description:
About this item
KITCHEN KIT Mortar and Pestle: Handcrafted from durable natural granite stone, it effortlessly crushes ingredients . Lasting qulity than can be passed through generations!
This Mortar and Pestle set will simplify spice, herb, and nut grinding, ensuring exceptional flavors with minimal effort.
This set is Meticulously made of 100 % Natural granite stone ; each piece meets the highest standards. The rubber base enhances stability and protects countertops for a seamless cooking experience.
Perfect gift for every occasion: KITCHEN KIT Mortar and Pestle, a symbol of strength and durability, make an exquisite gift for weddings, Mother's day or any special event !
Embrace nature's finest with KITCHEN KIT Mortar and Pestle: Eco-friendly and made from natural granite, it offers a pure and sustainable alternative for responsible cooking.

I received this last week and have not actually used it, yet, but I was amazed at how heavy and solid it is. The finish is beautiful. I did not expect such a nice product for under $20.
I will be great for making guacamole and crushing herbs.I’ve always wanted one of these to crush up herbs and seeds and I needed them one immediately for my dog medication so I could grind it up before she cause she won’t take the tablet himself and you know what it is very sturdy. It’ll last a lifetime it’s very well made and it looks nice on the bar doesn’t stand out and it’s not too heavy but it’s an excellent buy and I recommend if anybody’s gonna buy one. This should be your product because Charlotte table and a lot of other places Solomon sell them and they are very expensive otherwiseIf you need to see a review telling you to just buy it then that’s this one! I am so excited about this. It’s huge! And very nicely made. For the price, JUST BUY IT! I can’t wait to use it. Very very happy. Beautiful set. Very durable and thick. I love the size. Just add to cart now!I ordered this because my last one was too small. This one is perfect. The instruction booklet was great! After seasoning it following all steps, I used the set for the 1st time to make Sunday Football Guacamole and it worked like a charm! I would highly recommend this set.This set is heavy and works great! It's a genuine mortar and pestle.It is great for the needs it is intended for and helps make the greatest tasting salsaWorks great, excellent quality!I bought it to grind blue clay to make facial mask. I was a bit concerned with the necessity to seasob it first, especially that I didn't have rice. I think I used wheat or some other grains I had available, after searching what else besides rice I can use.
After solving the seasoning issue, it was a breeze. Good size for my purpose, very heavy weight by design, grinds the blocks of my blue clay into fine dust that I need to mix my DIY facial products.I love this thing!It’s perfect
